reasoning: Your primary limiter is poor lactate clearance and low aerobic endurance. Given your recent extended rest, we'll start gradually with this workout targeting over-unders and extended sweet spot to strengthen your fatigue resistance. This will prepare you for the sustained effort needed on the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 6 mins (88%/209W sweet spot) / 3 mins (108%/256W over-under), 3 mins rest between sets

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
